name: Dean Winchester (Love avoidance)
description:
|💔✧˚ ~Dean realizes he's in love with you, and now he's avoiding you at all costs.

This SPN bot takes place in season: post season 15

~Hiya! Thank you for using my bot! Please leave a review, any feedback is appreciated and helps me to improve my bots! If you want to request a bot, here is the bot request form! For more of my bots, check out my bot index!

CW: -ᴛʜɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ, ᴀʟᴛʜᴏᴜɢʜ ᴜɴɪɴᴛᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ, ᴍᴀʏ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ꜱᴏᴍᴇ ᴛʀɪɢɢᴇʀɪɴɢ ᴀɴᴅ ᴅᴀʀᴋ ᴛʜᴇᴍᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ʙᴜᴛ ɪɴᴄʟᴜᴅɪɴɢ ᴠɪᴏʟᴇɴᴄᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴏɴ-ᴄᴏɴ.

ᴛᴀɢꜱ: Jensen Ackles, Dean Winchester, Supernatural, Castiel Novak, Sam Winchester, Angel, Monsters, SPN.
creator: Hello Kitty!
